title: Orthogonal Hierarchical Decomposition for Structure-Aware Table Understanding with Large Language Models
abstract: arXiv:2602.01969v2 Announce Type: replace  Abstract: Complex tables with multi-level headers, merged cells and heterogeneous layouts pose persistent challenges for LLMs in both understanding and reasoning. Existing approaches typically rely on table linearization or normalized grid modeling. However, these representations struggle to explicitly capture hierarchical structures and cross-dimensional dependencies, which can lead to misalignment between structural semantics and textual representations for non-standard tables. To address this issue, we propose an Orthogonal Hierarchical Decomposition (OHD) framework that constructs structure-preserving input representations of complex tables for LLMs. OHD introduces an Orthogonal Tree Induction (OTI) method based on spatial--semantic co-constraints, which decomposes irregular tables into a column tree and a row tree to capture vertical and horizontal hierarchical dependencies, respectively. Building on this representation, we design a dual-

translated_title: 面向结构感知表格理解的正交层次分解方法（基于大型语言模型）
translated_abstract: arXiv:2602.01969v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：具有多层表头、合并单元格和异构布局的复杂表格，在理解和推理方面对大型语言模型（LLM）持续构成挑战。现有方法通常依赖于表格线性化或标准化网格建模。然而，这些表示方式难以明确捕捉层次结构和跨维度依赖关系，这可能导致非标准表格的结构语义与文本表示之间出现错位。为解决这一问题，我们提出了一种正交层次分解（OHD）框架，该框架可为LLM构建保留结构的复杂表格输入表示。OHD引入了一种基于空间-语义联合约束的正交树归纳（OTI）方法，该方法将不规则表格分解为列树和行树，分别捕捉垂直和水平层次依赖关系。基于这种表示，我们设计了一种双...
tldr: 本文提出正交层次分解（OHD）框架，通过空间-语义联合约束将复杂表格分解为列树和行树，从而为大型语言模型提供保留层次结构的输入表示，解决了现有方法无法有效捕捉非标准表格结构语义的问题。
en_tdlr: This paper proposes an Orthogonal Hierarchical Decomposition (OHD) framework that decomposes complex tables into column and row trees via spatial-semantic co-constraints, providing structure-preserving input representations for LLMs to address the misalignment between structural semantics and textual representations in non-standard tables.
